Modifications

Integrate #3267 into python side to optimize deepseekv3, merge it after #3267 has merged and sgl kernel is released

latency
accuracy

0.953


gsm8k (after)
82.708s
0.958


mmlu (before)
250.8

vllm.title: Further reduce the HTTP calls to huggingface.co
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implement file_exist using list_repo_files
Add retry logic to list_repo_files
Cache results of list_repo_files

cc: @khluu

vllm.title: [Misc] AMD Build Improvements
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Some changes to support Meta internal AMD build. Internally we can't directly use sys.executable, so this PR makes it's possible to modify the subprocess args.

vllm.title: [Bug] [V1] Try fetching stop_reason from EngineOutput before checking the request
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We weren't checking the stop_reason from EngineOutput before deriving the reason from the request_state + token ids.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix num video tokens calculation for Qwen2-VL
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Frontend] Generate valid tool call IDs when using `tokenizer-mode=mistral`
vllm.author: rafvasq
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR helps to address two scenarios when using --tokenizer-mode mistral:
Scenario 1.
Any time a request includes a tool call with an id that isn't length 9, it results in the error:
mistral_common.exceptions.InvalidFunctionCallException: Tool call id ... must be a-z, A-Z, 0-9, with a length of 9.

vllm.title: [Misc] Delete unused LoRA modules
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt: After LoRA submodules are replaced, these submodules can be safely deleted, reducing the  memory overhead

vllm.title: Introduce VLLM_CUDART_SO_PATH to allow users specify the .so path
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt: So user can specify the env var VLLM_CUDART_SO_PATH to work around if find_loaded_library fails.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Use mypy matcher for pre-commit CI job
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We have a mypy matcher that allows github to parse mypy output and inline errors
in the diff viewer on github. The config didn't make it over in the conversion
to pre-commit. This should restore having mypy errors surfaced more clearly on
PRs.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [CORE] [QUANT] Support for GPTQModel's `dynamic` quantization per module override/control
vllm.author: Qubitium
vllm.bodyExcerpt: GPTQModel v0.9.10-dev0 main branch has merged dynamic, per layer/module support of different gptq bits, sym, desc_act using a regex style definition. This is a work in process and we are awaiting feedback before release.  We are targeting both vllm and sglang compat with the quant so would like to w

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Allow fallback to AWQ from AWQMarlin at per-layer granularity
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Models like TechxGenus/DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct-AWQ have some layers that can't satisfy the constraints of marlin even for TP=1.
[rank0]: ValueError: Weight input_size_per_partition = 10944 is not divisible by min_thread_k = 128. Consider reducing tensor_parallel_size or running with --quanti

vllm.title: [CI] Fix failing FP8 cpu offload test
vllm.author: mgoin

vllm.title: [V1][Bugfix] Copy encoder input ids to fix set iteration issue during VLM abort
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a follow up to #12545. When aborting requests, there is a rare chance to run into the following error:
EngineCore hit an exception: Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/cserve_user/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/vllm/v1/engine/core.py", line 203, in run_engine_core
    engine_cor

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Ignore ruff warning up007
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change ignores the following warning from ruff:
UP007 Use X | Y for type annotations
We need to continue using the Optiona[T] syntax until Python 3.10
or above is our minimum supported version. I'm not sure why I only
see this in one of my environments, but not another. In any case,
it seems ha

vllm.title: [perf-benchmark] cleanup unused Docker images and volumes in H100 benchmark instance
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: ^ per title

vllm.title: [NVIDIA] Support nvfp4 quantization
vllm.author: kaixih
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Forked from this PR, we decide to separate the fp4 quantization and fp4 gemm as two PRs. (1) fp4 quantization focuses on how to convert higher precision to fp4, which only depends on the sm100a (i.e. ptx 8.7) and could be merged today (This PR); (2) fp4 gemm focuses on the gemm itself which needs to

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Example] Fix GCed profiling server for TPU
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix to TPU profiling example due to the profiling server not staying around long enough

vllm.title: [VLM] Implement merged multimodal processor for Mllama
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Initialize merged multimodal processor implementation for encoder-decoder LMMs

vllm.title: Simplify logic of locating CUDART so file path
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As @youkaichao pointed out in PR 12998, we indeed can simplify the logic of locating .so file.
Our original thoughts was have some partial path, instead we indeed can use the full path.
Now we always assume it's a single file and accurate path.

vllm.title: [Build] Automatically use the wheel of the base commit with Python-only build
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current command VLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED=1 pip install --editable . always uses the nightly wheel in the Python only build. However, this is not convenient because the dev branch one is working on may not be compatible with the nightly wheel. This PR enhances this command by checking the base commit

vllm.title: [Bugfix] deepseek_r1_reasoning_parser put reason content in wrong field in certain edge case
vllm.author: LikeSundayLikeRain
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There's an edge case where close think token  is not generated in output due to length limit, in such case, current reasoning parse put the partial reasoning token in content.
Given the model alway generate reasoning tokens(new chat template always append a open think tag), when no close tag detecte

vllm.title: [Frontend] Move CLI code into vllm.cmd package
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR includes some refactoring and minor bug fixes to the vllm CLI code.

Move code from vllm/scripts.py to a set of files under vllm/entrypoints/cli/. New commands (or related groups of commands) can each go in their own file in the future.
Fix error message that occurs when running just vllm.
F

vllm.title: Allow Unsloth Dynamic 4bit BnB quants to work
vllm.author: danielhanchen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR allows vLLM to skip applying bitsandbytes quantization to certain layers, and leave them in 16bit. This will for now work only on skipped modules specified inside of llm_int8_skip_modules
For example https://huggingface.co/unsloth/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B-unsloth-bnb-4bit/blob/main/confi

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Allow ruff to auto-fix some issues
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
ruff can auto-fix some types of issues. Turn that on, since we have
other tools doing the same thing, like yapf.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com
